output.sparql:
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?tree ?name WHERE {
  ?tree wdt:P31 wd:Q167334 .
  ?tree wdt:P170 wd:Q1672 .
  ?tree wdt:P3117 ?volume .
  ?volume wikibase:quantityAmount ?value .
  FILTER(?value > 912.5)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?tree rdfs:label ?name .
    FILTER(LANG(?name) = "en")
  }
}
output.answer: The giant sequoia with a trunk volume exceeding 912.5 cubic meters is the General Sherman Tree (Q1747767), which has an estimated volume of approximately 1,487 cubic meters. PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>

SELECT ?tree ?name

  ?tree wdt:P31 wd:Q167334 .  # Tree instance

  ?tree wdt:P3117 ?quantity .
  ?quantity wikibase:quantityAmount ?value .
  FILTER(?value > 912.5)
  OPTIONAL { ?tree rdfs:label ?name . FILTER(LANG(?name) = "en") }
}

args.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>

SELECT ?tree ?name
WHERE {
  ?tree wdt:P31 wd:Q167334 .
  ?tree wdt:P170 wd:Q1672 .
  ?tree wdt:P3117 ?volume .
  ?volume wikibase:quantityAmount ?value .
  FILTER(?value > 912.5)
  OPTIONAL { ?tree rdfs:label ?name . FILTER(LANG(?name) = "en") }
}
